title: Apples to Oranges
description: Turns apples into oranges! Compatible with the Eating Animation mod.
body:
This resource pack simply changes apples to oranges.

Credits to [Bountiful Fares](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful-fares) for the original item sprite. The animation and golden variants are by me though :)

This pack is also compatible with [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)

![Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/002237f3c0d585f00fcba25bb0dc383b280952c3.png)

I also recommend pairing [No Food Eating Particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-food-eating-particles) with Eating Animation (personal preference)
